name: io.github.ferodrigop/forge-terminal
title: Forge
description: Terminal MCP server for AI coding agents — spawn, manage, and monitor persistent PTY sessions. Real terminals with node-pty, incremental reads via ring buffer, headless xterm screen capture, multi-agent orchestration (Claude Code + Codex), web dashboard, and desktop app.

environmentVariables.name: FORGE_BUFFER_SIZE
environmentVariables.description: Ring buffer size per session in bytes (default: 1048576)

environmentVariables.name: FORGE_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Require Bearer token for /mcp, /api, and /ws endpoints
